tasks.subject: Add prompt-based fetching and scheduled updates to widgets
tasks.description:
Make widgets support prompt-based fetching (backend parses prompt to modify API calls), editable prompts in widget settings, and scheduled auto-refresh. This includes:

1. Backend: Add `prompt` field to request models and modify services to parse prompts
2. Backend: Create prompt parsers for Gmail, Calendar, Tasks, Drive
3. Frontend: Pass prompt to API calls when fetching data
4. Frontend: Add prompt editor to widget settings
5. Frontend: Add scheduled refresh logic (interval-based polling)
6. Frontend: Make refresh button use the current prompt

Backend files to modify:
- backend/models.py (add prompt field)
- backend/routers/data.py (pass prompt to services)
- backend/services/google_api.py (parse prompt and modify API calls)

Frontend files to modify:
- frontend/src/services/api.ts (pass prompt to API calls)
- frontend/src/components/GridWidget.tsx (add prompt editor)
- frontend/src/components/widgets/GmailWidget.tsx (pass prompt to fetchData)
- frontend/src/components/widgets/CalendarWidget.tsx (pass prompt to fetchData)
- frontend/src/components/widgets/TasksWidget.tsx (pass prompt to fetchData)
- frontend/src/components/widgets/DriveWidget.tsx (pass prompt to fetchData)
- frontend/src/components/widgets/AIWidget.tsx (pass prompt to fetchData)
- frontend/src/stores/layoutStore.ts (add refresh intervals)
tasks.activeForm: Adding prompt-based fetching and scheduled updates
